authored_by: no-stake blind statistics subagent (no benchmark/ground-truth/thread-outcome access)
metric: percentile rank of side_b in a fixed pool of K candidates (0=best/top, 100=worst)
assumptions: percentile-rank marginal SD ~29pt; LLM vs bestnull paired within same K-pool, rho~0.75 -> SD of paired difference SD_d ~20pt
frozen_decision_rule: REASONING-CONFIRMED iff one-sided paired Wilcoxon p<0.05 AND bootstrap CI lower bound > 5 percentile-rank pts, on n>=110 clean-stratum pairs (K=50); gated by pinned-model recall@10 in [0.50,0.90] on the 5 anchors, positive-control fire>=0.90 (m=40), stratum false-miss<=0.10, rubric kappa>=0.60. Else INCONCLUSIVE. MEMORIZATION is not an available outcome.
power_calc: n = (z0.05+z0.20)^2 (SD_d/delta)^2 = (1.645+0.842)^2 (20/5)^2 = 6.18*16 ~= 99; +~10% Wilcoxon overhead -> 110; standardized effect delta/SD_d=0.25
